calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-14-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Atty. David G. Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ramanlal D. Patel
Plaintiff's Witness: Ramanlal D. Patel was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Oleg Lyubarsky aka Oleg Lyubarskiy The following exhibits was identified and moved into evidence: Exhibit 1- Three days notice
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant Oleg Lyubarsky aka OLEG LYUBARSKIY as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 2361 Mission Street # 212, San Francisco, CA 94110.
Back-Rent - $2,240.00; Damages- $2,440.00
Costs $230.00 for a Total of $ 4,910.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDDANT OLEG LYUBARSKY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

COMMISSIONER: SUE KAPLAN; CLERK: BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
